title: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills - A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls.
content: GitHub - forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills: A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Dismiss alert forrestchang / andrej-karpathy-skills Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 3.9k Star 47.4k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 25 Commits 25 Commits .claude-plugin .claude-plugin skills/ karpathy-guidelines skills/ karpathy-guidelines CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md EXAMPLES.md EXAMPLES.md README.md README.md View all files Repository files navigation Karpathy-Inspired Claude Code Guidelines Check out my new project Multica — an open-source platform for running and managing coding agents with reusable skills. Follow me on X: https://x.com/jiayuan_jy A single CLAUDE.md file to improve Claude Code behavior, derived from Andrej Karpathy's observations on LLM coding pitfalls. The Problems From Andrej's post: "The models make wrong assumptions on your behalf and just run along with them without checking. They don't manage their confusion, don't seek clarifications, don't surface inconsistencies, don't present tradeoffs, don't push back when they should." "They really like to overcomplicate code and APIs, bloat abstractions, don't clean up dead code... implement a bloated construction over 1000 lines when 100 would do." "They still sometimes change/remove comments and code they don't sufficiently understand as side effects, even if orthogonal to the task." The Solution Four principles in one file that directly address these issues: Principle Addresses Think Before Coding Wrong assumptions, hidden confusion, missing tradeoffs Simplicity First Overcomplication, bloated abstractions Surgical Changes Orthogonal edits, touching code you shouldn't Goal-Driven Execution Leverage through tests-first, verifiable success criteria The Four Principles in Detail 1. Think Before Coding Don't assume. Don't hide confusion. Surface tradeoffs. LLMs often pick an interpretation silently and run with it. This principle forces explicit reasoning: State assumptions explicitly — If uncertain, ask rather than guess Present multiple interpretations — Don't pick silently when ambiguity exists Push back when warranted — If a simpler approach exists, say so Stop when confused — Name what's unclear and ask for clarification 2. Simplicity First Minimum code that solves the problem. Nothing speculative. Combat the tendency toward overengineering: No features beyond what was asked No abstractions for single-use code No "flexibility" or "configurability" that wasn't requested No error handling for impossible scenarios
title_zh: forrestchang/andrej-karpathy-skills - 一个单独的CLAUDE.md文件，用于改进Claude代码行为，源自Andrej Karpathy对LLM编码陷阱的观察。
summary_zh: GitHub用户forrestchang创建了一个名为"andrej-karpathy-skills"的项目，其核心是一个单独的CLAUDE.md文件，旨在改进Claude Code（Claude的代码生成功能）的行为。该项目灵感来源于AI研究员Andrej Karpathy对LLM（大语言模型）编码常见缺陷的观察。，Karpathy指出LLM在编码时存在几个关键问题：模型会基于错误假设自行其是而不加验证；不善于管理自身的困惑、寻求澄清、指出不一致性、呈现权衡选项或在必要时提出异议；倾向于过度复杂化代码和API，堆砌抽象层，不清理无用代码，可能用上千行代码实现一个本可用百行完成的功能；有时甚至会因副作用而修改或删除它们未能充分理解的注释或代码，即使这些内容与当前任务无关。，该项目提出的解决方案通过一个文件阐述了四项核心原则，直接应对上述问题：，1. 先思考后编码：针对错误假设、隐藏的困惑和缺失的权衡。要求模型明确陈述假设，存在不确定性时应提问而非猜测；呈现多种可能的解释，避免在存在歧义时 silently 做出选择；在必要时提出异议（例如存在更简单方案时）；遇到困惑时明确指出不清楚之处并请求澄清。，2. 简洁至上：针对过度复杂化和臃肿的抽象。强调只编写解决当前问题所需的最少代码，杜绝推测性内容。具体包括：不添加未要求的功能；不为单次使用的代码创建抽象；不引入未请求的“灵活性”或“可配置性”；不为不可能发生的场景添加错误处理。，3. 精准修改：针对无关的编辑和触碰不应修改的代码。确保更改严格限定于任务范围，避免产生不必要的副作用。，4. 目标驱动执行：通过测试优先和可验证的成功标准来提升效率。，该项目将这些原则整合到一个CLAUDE.md文件中，用户可将其用作Claude的上下文提示，以引导模型生成更可靠、更简洁、更专注的代码。项目仓库还包含示例文件（EXAMPLES.md）和技能目录，进一步说明了如何应用这些指南。

This enables Claude to maintain continuity of knowledge about projects even after sessions end or reconnect. Quick Start Install with a single command: npx claude-mem install Or install for Gemini CLI (auto-detects ~/.gemini ): npx claude-mem install --ide gemini-cli Or install for OpenCode: npx claude-mem install --ide opencode Or install from the plugin marketplace inside Claude Code: /plugin marketplace add thedotmack/claude-mem /plugin install claude-mem Restart Claude Code or Gemini CLI. Context from previous sessions will automatically appear in new sessions. Note: Claude-Mem i
title_zh: Claude代码插件claude-mem：自动记录编码会话中Claude的所有操作，通过AI（使用Claude的agent-sdk）压缩信息，并将相关上下文注入未来会话。
summary_zh: GitHub项目thedotmack/claude-mem是一个专为Claude Code设计的持久化记忆压缩系统插件。该插件能够自动捕获用户在编码会话中与Claude交互的所有操作，利用AI技术（基于Claude的agent-sdk）对这些内容进行压缩处理，并将相关的上下文信息智能地注入到未来的会话中。，其核心功能在于实现跨会话的上下文无缝保存与延续。系统会自动捕获Claude工具使用的观察记录，生成语义摘要，并使这些信息在后续会话中可用。这使得Claude即使在会话结束或重新连接后，也能保持对项目知识的连续性，有效解决了大型语言模型（LLM）的上下文长度限制和会话状态丢失问题。，项目提供了便捷的安装方式，用户可通过单一命令（npx claude-mem install）进行安装，也支持通过Claude Code内部的插件市场直接添加。它兼容多种IDE环境，包括Gemini CLI（可自动检测~/.gemini目录）和OpenCode。安装并重启相应环境后，先前会话的上下文便会自动出现在新会话中。，该系统的价值在于显著提升了开发者与AI编程助手（如Claude）长期协作的效率。通过自动化的上下文记忆、压缩与召回，它减少了用户在重复解释项目背景、代码历史和决策逻辑上的时间消耗，使得AI助手能够更连贯、更智能地参与复杂的、跨越多天的软件开发流程。本质上，它为Claude Code构建了一个外部的、智能化的记忆层，是对现有RAG（检索增强生成）和会话管理能力的重要增强。

title: lsdefine/GenericAgent - Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption
content: GitHub - lsdefine/GenericAgent: Self-evolving agent: grows skill tree from 3.3K-line seed, achieving full system control with 6x less token consumption · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert lsdefine / GenericAgent Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 296 Star 2.5k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 361 Commits 361 Commits assets assets frontends frontends memory memory reflect reflect tests tests .gitignore .gitignore GETTING_STARTED.md GETTING_STARTED.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md TMWebDriver.py TMWebDriver.py agent_loop.py agent_loop.py agentmain.py agentmain.py ga.py ga.py hub.pyw hub.pyw launch.pyw launch.pyw llmcore.py llmcore.py mykey_template.py mykey_template.py simphtml.py simphtml.py View all files Repository files navigation English | 中文 🌟 Overview GenericAgent is a minimal, self-evolving autonomous agent framework. Its core is just ~3K lines of code . Through 9 atomic tools + a ~100-line Agent Loop , it grants any LLM system-level control over a local computer — covering browser, terminal, filesystem, keyboard/mouse input, screen vision, and mobile devices (ADB). Its design philosophy: don't preload skills — evolve them. Every time GenericAgent solves a new task, it automatically crystallizes the execution path into an skill for direct reuse later. The longer you use it, the more skills accumulate — forming a skill tree that belongs entirely to you, grown from 3K lines of seed code. 🤖 Self-Bootstrap Proof — Everything in this repository, from installing Git and running git init to every commit message, was completed autonomously by GenericAgent. The author never opened a terminal once. 📋 Core Features Self-Evolving : Automatically crystallizes each task into an skill. Capabilities grow with every use, forming your personal skill tree. Minimal Architecture : ~3K lines of core code. Agent Loop is ~100 lines. No complex dependencies, zero deployment overhead. Strong Execution : Injects into a real browser (preserving login sessions). 9 atomic tools take direct control of the system. High Compatibility : Supports Claude / Gemini / Kimi / MiniMax and other major models. Cross-platform. Token Efficient : <30K context window — a fraction of the 200K–1M other agents consume. Layered memory ensures the right knowledge is always in scope. Less noise, fewer hallucinations, higher success rate — at a fraction of the cost. 🧬 Self-Evolution Mechanism This is what fundamentally distinguishes GenericAgent from every other agent framework. [New Task] --> [Autonomous Exploration] (install deps, write scripts, debug & verify) --> [Crystallize Execution Path into skill] -
title_zh: lsdefine/GenericAgent - 自进化智能体：从3300行种子代码生长技能树，以6倍更低令牌消耗实现完整系统控制
summary_zh: GitHub项目lsdefine/GenericAgent是一个极简、自进化的自主智能体框架。其核心代码仅约3300行，通过9个原子工具和约100行的Agent Loop，使任何LLM（如Claude、Gemini、Kimi、MiniMax等）能够获得对本地计算机的系统级控制，覆盖浏览器、终端、文件系统、键盘/鼠标输入、屏幕视觉以及移动设备（通过ADB）。，该框架的设计哲学是“不预载技能，而是进化技能”。每次GenericAgent解决一个新任务时，它会自动将执行路径“结晶化”为一个可复用的技能。随着使用时间增长，技能不断积累，形成一棵完全属于用户的、从3300行种子代码生长而来的技能树。项目作者通过“自举”证明了其能力：仓库中的所有操作，从安装Git、运行git init到每次提交信息，均由GenericAgent自主完成，作者本人从未打开过终端。，核心特性包括：自进化能力，每次任务都会转化为持久化技能；极简架构，依赖少且零部署开销；强大的执行能力，可注入真实浏览器（保持登录会话），通过9个原子工具直接控制系统；高兼容性，支持多种主流模型并跨平台运行；以及极高的token效率，其上下文窗口小于30K token，仅为其他智能体框架（通常需200K-1M token）的很小一部分，通过分层记忆机制确保相关上下文精准在轨，从而减少噪声和幻觉，以更低成本实现更高成功率。，其自进化机制是区别于其他智能体框架的根本：面对新任务时，智能体进行自主探索（安装依赖、编写脚本、调试验证），最终将成功的执行路径结晶为技能。这种设计使得智能体的能力能够持续自主增长，同时大幅降低了token消耗（据称可达6倍效率提升）。

title: google/magika - Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection
content: GitHub - google/magika: Fast and accurate AI powered file content types detection · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert google / magika Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 751 Star 14.3k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1,727 Commits 1,727 Commits .cargo .cargo .gemini .gemini .github .github assets assets docs docs go go js js python python rust rust tests_data tests_data website-ng website-ng website website .dockerignore .dockerignore .gitattributes .gitattributes .gitignore .gitignore CITATION.cff CITATION.cff CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md Dockerfile Dockerfile LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md dist-workspace.toml dist-workspace.toml View all files Repository files navigation Magika Magika is a novel AI-powered file type detection tool that relies on the recent advance of deep learning to provide accurate detection. Under the hood, Magika employs a custom, highly optimized model that only weighs about a few MBs, and enables precise file identification within milliseconds, even when running on a single CPU. Magika has been trained and evaluated on a dataset of ~100M samples across 200+ content types (covering both binary and textual file formats), and it achieves an average ~99% accuracy on our test set. Here is an example of what Magika command line output looks like: Magika is used at scale to help improve Google users' safety by routing Gmail, Drive, and Safe Browsing files to the proper security and content policy scanners, processing hundreds billions samples on a weekly basis. Magika has also been integrated with VirusTotal ( example ) and abuse.ch ( example ). For more context you can read our initial announcement post on Google's OSS blog , you can consult Magika's website , and you can read more in our research paper , published at the IEEE/ACM International Conference on Software Engineering (ICSE) 2025. You can try Magika without installing anything by using our web demo , which runs locally in your browser! Highlights Available as a command line tool written in Rust, a Python API, and additional bindings for Rust, JavaScript/TypeScript (with an experimental npm package, which powers our web demo ), and GoLang (WIP). Trained and evaluated on a dataset of ~100M files across 200+ content types . On our test set, Magika achieves ~99% average precision and recall, outperforming existing approaches -- especially on textual content types. After the model is loaded (which is a one-off overhead), the inference time is about 5ms per file, even when run on a single CPU. You can invoke Magika with even thousands of files at the same time. You can also use -r for
title_zh: 谷歌Magika：基于AI的快速准确文件内容类型检测工具
summary_zh: 谷歌开源了Magika，这是一个基于AI的新型文件类型检测工具，它利用深度学习的最新进展来提供精确检测。Magika的核心是一个定制化且高度优化的模型，其大小仅为几MB，即使在单CPU上运行，也能在毫秒级时间内实现精确的文件识别。，该工具在包含约1亿个样本、涵盖200多种内容类型（包括二进制和文本文件格式）的数据集上进行了训练和评估，在测试集上实现了平均约99%的准确率。Magika在谷歌内部已大规模应用，通过将Gmail、Drive和Safe Browsing中的文件路由到适当的安全和内容策略扫描器，每周处理数千亿个样本，以帮助提升谷歌用户的安全性。此外，Magika也已集成到VirusTotal和abuse.ch等平台中。，Magika提供了多种使用方式：一个用Rust编写的命令行工具、一个Python API，以及针对Rust、JavaScript/TypeScript（包含一个实验性的npm包，为其Web演示版提供支持）和GoLang（开发中）的额外绑定。其突出特点包括：在包含200多种内容类型的约1亿文件数据集上训练和评估；在测试集上实现了约99%的平均精确率和召回率，性能优于现有方法，尤其是在文本内容类型上；模型加载后（此为一次性开销），每个文件的推理时间约为5毫秒，即使运行在单CPU上；并且可以同时处理数千个文件。，用户无需安装任何软件，即可通过在其浏览器本地运行的Web演示版进行体验。更多背景信息可参考谷歌开源博客的初始公告、Magika官方网站，以及发表在2025年IEEE/ACM国际软件工程会议（ICSE）上的研究论文。

Star this repo! 📚 Check our detailed documentation for setup and configuration. 🦀 Available as a plugin for your OpenClaw — cognee-openclaw ✴️ Available as a plugin for your Claude Code — claude-code-plugin Cognee memory plugin Why use Cognee: Knowledge infrastructure — unified ingestion, graph/vector search, runs locally, ontology grounding, multimodal Persistent and Learning Agents
title_zh: topoteretes/cognee - 仅用6行代码实现AI代理记忆的知识引擎
summary_zh: 开源项目Cognee是一个为AI智能体构建记忆系统的知识引擎，其核心承诺是仅用6行代码即可实现。该项目在GitHub上已获得超过1.5万颗星标，显示出较高的社区关注度。，Cognee旨在为AI Agent提供个性化、动态且持续学习的记忆能力。它允许用户以任何格式或结构摄取数据，并通过结合向量搜索、图数据库以及认知科学方法，使文档既能根据语义被搜索，又能随着数据的变化和演进，通过关系相互连接。这种设计使得AI智能体能够获得更准确、更具关联性的上下文信息。，该项目的关键价值在于提供了一个统一的知识基础设施。它集成了数据摄取、图与向量搜索等功能，并支持本地运行、本体论基础以及多模态处理。这使得开发者能够为其AI Agent构建持久且具备学习能力的记忆系统，从而提升智能体的长期交互和任务执行能力。，Cognee生态系统正在扩展，目前已提供多种集成方式。它包括一个独立的cognee库、一个cognee-starter-kit入门套件、一个cognee-frontend前端界面，以及针对特定平台的插件，例如为OpenClaw提供的cognee-openclaw插件和为Claude Code设计的claude-code-plugin。项目还提供了详细的文档、演示示例，并拥有活跃的Discord社区和Reddit板块（r/AIMemory）供开发者交流。其文档支持包括中文在内的多种语言，降低了全球开发者的使用门槛。，总而言之，Cognee通过一个简洁的API，将复杂的数据处理、关联与检索技术封装起来，让开发者能够高效地为AI智能体赋能强大的记忆功能，是构建更智能、更具上下文感知能力的AI应用的有力工具。

title: openai/openai-agents-python - A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
content: GitHub - openai/openai-agents-python: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert openai / openai-agents-python Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 3.4k Star 21k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1,338 Commits 1,338 Commits .agents/ skills .agents/ skills .codex .codex .github .github .vscode .vscode docs docs examples examples src/ agents src/ agents tests tests .gitignore .gitignore .prettierrc .prettierrc AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md LICENSE LICENSE Makefile Makefile PLANS.md PLANS.md README.md README.md mkdocs.yml mkdocs.yml pyproject.toml pyproject.toml pyrightconfig.json pyrightconfig.json uv.lock uv.lock View all files Repository files navigation OpenAI Agents SDK The OpenAI Agents SDK is a lightweight yet powerful framework for building multi-agent workflows. It is provider-agnostic, supporting the OpenAI Responses and Chat Completions APIs, as well as 100+ other LLMs. Note Looking for the JavaScript/TypeScript version? Check out Agents SDK JS/TS . Core concepts: Agents : LLMs configured with instructions, tools, guardrails, and handoffs Sandbox Agents : Agents preconfigured to work with a container to perform work over long time horizons. Agents as tools / Handoffs : Delegating to other agents for specific tasks Tools : Various Tools let agents take actions (functions, MCP, hosted tools) Guardrails : Configurable safety checks for input and output validation Human in the loop : Built-in mechanisms for involving humans across agent runs Sessions : Automatic conversation history management across agent runs Tracing : Built-in tracking of agent runs, allowing you to view, debug and optimize your workflows Realtime Agents : Build powerful voice agents with gpt-realtime-1.5 and full agent features Explore the examples directory to see the SDK in action, and read our documentation for more details. Get started To get started, set up your Python environment (Python 3.10 or newer required), and then install OpenAI Agents SDK package. venv python -m venv .venv source .venv/bin/activate # On Windows: .venv\Scripts\activate pip install openai-agents For voice support, install with the optional voice group: pip install 'openai-agents[voice]' . For Redis session support, install with the optional redis group: pip install 'openai-agents[redis]' . uv If you're familiar with uv , installing the package would be even easier: uv init uv add openai-agents For voice support, install with the optional voice group: uv add 'openai-agents[voice]' . For Redis session support, install with the optional redis group: uv add '
title_zh: OpenAI/openai-agents-python - 一个轻量级、功能强大的多智能体工作流框架
summary_zh: OpenAI近日在GitHub上开源了其Agents SDK的Python版本（openai/openai-agents-python），这是一个轻量级但功能强大的多智能体工作流构建框架。该框架的核心设计是提供商无关的，不仅支持OpenAI自家的Responses和Chat Completions API，还兼容超过100种其他大型语言模型（LLM），为开发者提供了高度的灵活性。，框架围绕几个核心概念构建。智能体（Agents）是核心单元，可配置指令、工具、防护栏和任务移交机制。沙盒智能体（Sandbox Agents）是预配置的智能体，能在容器环境中运行，处理长时间任务。框架支持智能体作为工具或进行任务移交（Handoffs），实现智能体间的任务委托。工具（Tools）种类丰富，允许智能体执行函数、使用模型上下文协议（MCP）或调用托管工具。防护栏（Guardrails）提供可配置的安全检查，用于输入输出验证。此外，框架内置了人工介入（Human in the loop）机制、跨智能体运行的自动会话历史管理（Sessions），以及用于查看、调试和优化工作流的运行追踪（Tracing）功能。特别值得注意的是，该SDK支持实时智能体（Realtime Agents），开发者可以利用gpt-realtime-1.5等模型构建功能强大的语音智能体。，项目要求Python 3.10或更高版本。用户可以通过pip命令`pip install openai-agents`进行安装。若需语音功能支持，可安装可选组件`pip install 'openai-agents[voice]'`；如需Redis会话支持，则安装`pip install 'openai-agents[redis]'`。对于使用uv包管理器的用户，安装过程更为简便。项目提供了丰富的示例代码和详细文档，帮助开发者快速上手并构建复杂的多智能体协作应用。

title: EvoMap/evolver - The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai
content: GitHub - EvoMap/evolver: The GEP-Powered Self-Evolution Engine for AI Agents. Genome Evolution Protocol. | evomap.ai · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert EvoMap / evolver Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 315 Star 2.9k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 2 Commits 2 Commits assets assets scripts scripts src src test test .gitignore .gitignore .npmignore .npmignore CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md README.zh-CN.md README.zh-CN.md SKILL.md SKILL.md index.js index.js package.json package.json View all files Repository files navigation 🧬 Evolver evomap.ai | Documentation | Chinese / 中文文档 | GitHub | Releases "Evolution is not optional. Adapt or die." Three lines What it is : A GEP -powered self-evolution engine for AI agents. Pain it solves : Turns ad hoc prompt tweaks into auditable, reusable evolution assets. Use in 30 seconds : Clone, install, run node index.js -- get a GEP-guided evolution prompt. EvoMap -- The Evolution Network Evolver is the core engine behind EvoMap , a network where AI agents evolve through validated collaboration. Visit evomap.ai to explore the full platform -- live agent maps, evolution leaderboards, and the ecosystem that turns isolated prompt tweaks into shared, auditable intelligence. Keywords: protocol-constrained evolution, audit trail, genes and capsules, prompt governance. Installation Prerequisites Node.js >= 18 Git -- Required. Evolver uses git for rollback, blast radius calculation, and solidify. Running in a non-git directory will fail with a clear error message. Setup git clone https://github.com/EvoMap/evolver.git cd evolver npm install To connect to the EvoMap network , create a .env file (optional): # Register at https://evomap.ai to get your Node ID A2A_HUB_URL=https://evomap.ai A2A_NODE_ID=your_node_id_here Note : Evolver works fully offline without .env . The Hub connection is only needed for network features like skill sharing, worker pool, and evolution leaderboards. Quick Start # Single evolution run -- scans logs, selects a Gene, outputs a GEP prompt node index.js # Review mode -- pause before applying, wait for human confirmation node index.js --review # Continuous loop -- runs as a background daemon node index.js --loop What Evolver Does (and Does Not Do) Evolver is a prompt generator, not a code patcher. Each evolution cycle: Scans your memory/ directory for runtime logs, error patterns, and signals. Selects the best-matching Gene or Capsule from assets/gep/ . Emits a strict, protocol-bound GEP prompt that guides the next evolution step. Records an auditable EvolutionEvent for traceability.
title_zh: EvoMap/evolver - 基于GEP的AI智能体自进化引擎。基因组进化协议。| evomap.ai
summary_zh: EvoMap/evolver项目是一个基于GEP（基因组进化协议）的AI智能体自我进化引擎。该项目旨在解决传统AI智能体开发中存在的临时性提示词调整问题，将这些零散的优化过程转化为可审计、可复用的进化资产。，该引擎是EvoMap进化网络的核心组件。EvoMap是一个AI智能体通过经验证的合作进行进化的网络平台，提供实时智能体图谱、进化排行榜等功能，将孤立的提示词调整转变为可共享、可审计的集体智能。，evolver的核心功能是作为一个协议约束的提示词生成器。在每个进化周期中，它会扫描`memory/`目录中的运行时日志、错误模式和信号，从`assets/gep/`目录中选择最匹配的基因（Gene）或胶囊（Capsule），然后生成一个严格的、受协议约束的GEP提示词，以指导下一个进化步骤。整个过程会记录可审计的进化事件，确保可追溯性。需要明确的是，evolver是一个提示词生成器，而非代码修补工具。，项目要求Node.js >= 18和Git环境。Git被用于回滚、影响范围计算和固化操作。安装后，用户可以通过简单的命令运行：`node index.js`进行单次进化；使用`--review`参数进入审查模式，在应用前等待人工确认；使用`--loop`参数则可作为后台守护进程持续运行。项目支持完全离线运行，如需连接EvoMap网络以使用技能共享、工作池和进化排行榜等功能，则需配置环境变量。，其核心价值在于通过标准化的协议（GEP），为AI智能体的迭代优化引入了可管理、可协作的框架，实现了从临时性调试到系统性进化的转变。

Works on desktop, phone and wearables. Fully open source. Trusted by 300,000+ professionals. Website · Docs · Discord · Twitter · DeepWiki Quick Start Try in Browser git clone https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi.git && cd omi/desktop && ./run.sh --yolo Builds the macOS app, connects to the cloud backend, and launches. No env files, no credentials, no local backend. Requirements: macOS 14+, Xcode (includes Swift & code signing), Node.js Full Installation For local development with the full backend stack: Install prerequisites xcode-select --install curl --proto ' =https ' --tlsv1.2 -sSf https://sh.rustup.rs | sh Clone and configure git clone https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi.git cd omi/desktop cp Backend-Rust/.env.example Backend-Rust/.env Build and run ./run.sh See desktop/README.md for environment variables and credential setup. Mobile App cd app && bash setup.sh ios # or: bash setup.sh android How it works ┌─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────┐ │ Your Devices │ │ │ │ ┌──────────┐ ┌──────────────┐ ┌───────────────────┐ │ │ │ Omi │ │ macOS App │ │ Mobile App │ │ │ │ Wearable │ │ (Swift/Rust) │ │ (Flutter) │ │ │ └────┬─────┘ └──────┬───────┘ └────────┬──────────┘ │ │ │ BLE │ HTTPS/WS │ │ └───────┼────────────────┼────────────────
title_zh: 基于硬件的omi——能看见你的屏幕、听见你的对话并指导你行动的AI
summary_zh: GitHub开源项目omi是一个能够“观察”用户屏幕、“聆听”对话并提供智能建议的AI助手。它被描述为“比你第一大脑更值得信赖的第二大脑”。omi的核心功能是实时捕获用户的屏幕内容和对话，进行实时转录，并自动生成摘要和待办事项。它提供了一个AI聊天界面，能够记住用户所见所闻的一切，实现基于完整上下文的交互。，该项目支持跨平台运行，包括桌面端（macOS）、手机和可穿戴设备。其技术架构涉及多个组件：桌面端应用基于Swift和Rust开发，移动端应用使用Flutter框架，设备间通过BLE（蓝牙低功耗）或HTTPS/WebSocket进行通信。omi完全开源，并声称已获得超过30万专业人士的信任。，项目提供了快速上手的体验方式，用户可以通过浏览器尝试，或通过简单的命令行操作在macOS上构建并运行应用，该过程会自动连接云端后端，无需手动配置环境文件或凭证。对于完整的本地开发，项目则需要安装Xcode、Rust和Node.js等先决条件，并配置后端环境变量。，omi旨在成为一个无处不在的个人AI协作者，通过整合视觉和听觉信息，为用户的工作流提供记忆和智能辅助，其开源特性也鼓励社区参与开发和插件生态建设。

title: 台积电：AI 界“真霸主”，谁能撼动？
title_zh: 台积电：AI 界“真霸主”，谁能撼动？

title: Agent Card
summary_zh: 是一个旨在标准化和简化AI智能体（Agent）评估与比较的开源框架。随着基于大型语言模型（LLM）的智能体应用激增，如何系统、公平地评估其能力成为开发者和研究者的关键挑战。项目通过引入一套标准化的“卡片”模板来解决这一问题，其核心功能是为每个AI智能体创建一份结构化的能力说明书。，该框架的核心价值在于提供了统一的评估维度与呈现格式。一张会详细记录智能体的关键信息，包括其核心功能描述、所依赖的基础模型（如GPT-4、Claude 3等）、使用的特定技术栈（例如是否采用RAG检索增强生成、工具调用能力）、训练或微调数据、支持的任务类型（如代码生成、数据分析、客服对话）、性能基准测试结果、已知的局限性、安全与伦理考量以及部署要求。这类似于为机器学习模型创建“模型卡片”，但专门针对具备自主规划和执行能力的智能体。，的特点在于其开源和可扩展性。项目代码托管于GitHub，鼓励社区贡献和自定义评估指标。它旨在促进不同智能体之间的透明化比较，帮助用户根据具体需求（如准确性、速度、成本、安全性）选择最合适的Agent。对于开发者而言，创建有助于系统化地记录设计决策与测试结果，提升开发流程的规范性；对于研究者和企业用户，它则提供了一个客观的评估基准，降低了评估复杂AI系统的门槛。，总之，项目通过标准化文档框架，致力于提升AI智能体生态的透明度、可重复性和互操作性，是推动智能体技术从原型走向成熟生产应用的重要基础设施工具。
